comment: Clear lectures and fair grading, but the midterm felt rushed.
One of the best instructors I have had; explanations finally made the material click.
Workload was heavy for the units, though the feedback on assignments was detailed.
Engaging discussions, but office hours always filled up before I got a turn.
Patient and approachable; I never felt embarrassed to ask a basic question.
Lectures ran long and often went over time, which made the pace hard to follow.
Grading rubric was unclear at first, but it improved a lot after the first essay.
Very responsive over email and willing to meet outside of scheduled hours.
The group project was disorganized, though the lecture content was strong.
Exams matched what we covered, no surprises, which I appreciated.
Slides were dense and hard to read; I relied mostly on the textbook.
